summary: Comprehensive testing of Golden Signals, Customer Experience, and Enhanced Healing features. All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend Dashboard shows Golden Signals section with 4 signal cards (Latency, Traffic, Errors, Saturation), Customer Experience section with Apdex/P50/P95/P99/Availability/Error Budget, and Auto-Heal tab with Enable/Alert-Heal buttons and SRI vs Golden Signals circular progress rings. Products page and Cart operations working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/metrics/golden-signals - returns 4 golden signals (latency, traffic, errors, saturation) with health scores
GET /api/metrics/golden-signals - includes signal_contributions and sri fields
GET /api/metrics/customer-experience - returns Apdex score with label
GET /api/metrics/customer-experience - returns error_budget with slo, total, consumed, remaining, remaining_pct
GET /api/metrics/real - includes golden_signals field with all 4 signals
POST /api/healing/toggle - supports both enabled and alert_driven fields
POST /api/healing/trigger - returns correction_factors per golden signal
SRI baseline calibration - warmup_complete field exists
Admin login working with admin@freshcart.com / admin123
Frontend: Golden Signals section visible on Overview tab with 4 signal cards
Frontend: Customer Experience section visible with Apdex, percentiles, availability, error budget
Frontend: Auto-Heal tab shows Enable and Alert-Heal ON/OFF buttons
Frontend: Auto-Heal tab shows SRI vs Golden Signals circular progress rings
Frontend: Cart operations work (add to cart, view cart)
critical_code_review_comments: Golden Signals implementation follows Google SRE best practices with 4 signals: Latency, Traffic, Errors, Saturation
Customer Experience metrics include industry-standard Apdex scoring with T=200ms threshold
SRI baseline calibration correctly blends baseline (0.85) with real SRI during warmup period
Correction factors per golden signal provide granular healing effectiveness tracking
Alert-driven healing (on_alert) correctly maps alert categories to appropriate healing actions
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - metrics are generated from real API interactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Golden Signals and Customer Experience features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: /api/metrics/golden-signals, /api/metrics/customer-experience. Enhanced endpoints: /api/metrics/real (includes golden_signals, customer_experience, signal_contributions), /api/healing/status (includes golden_signals, signal_contributions, alert_driven), /api/healing/toggle (supports both enabled and alert_driven), /api/healing/trigger (returns correction_factors and golden_signals_before/after), /api/healing/recommendations (includes golden_signals and correction_history). Frontend data-testid attributes: golden-signals-section, customer-experience-section, autoheal-tab, toggle-autoheal-btn, toggle-alert-driven-btn, sri-golden-signals.
